headline: How Evercore’s Upgrade and Merger Optimism At Union Pacific (UNP) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Earlier in March 2026, Evercore ISI upgraded Union Pacific Corporation after its presentation at the JPMorgan Industrials Conference, highlighting the railroad’s strong volume trends, margins, and relative valuation, alongside a pending merger application that could reshape its operations. Separately, Union Pacific’s plans for high‑profile commemorative locomotives and a Big Boy steam tour to the East Coast underscore the brand’s national visibility and public engagement at a time when...
